ksef_number.description: Polish KSeF (Krajowy System e-Faktur) reference number, if present. Null for non-Polish invoices

invoice_number.description: Invoice identifier. Look for labels like Invoice No, Faktura nr, Invoice #, Numer faktury

issue_date.description: Invoice issue date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Look for labels like Date, Issue Date, Data wystawienia

sales_date.description: Date when the sale or service was delivered, in YYYY-MM-DD format. Look for labels like Service Date, Data sprzedazy, Delivery Date

due_date.description: Payment due date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Look for labels like Due Date, Payment Due, Termin platnosci

seller_nip.description: Seller's tax ID. EU VAT number with country prefix (e.g. PL7831812212, DE123456789) or US EIN/TIN. Include the country prefix if present

seller_name.description: Full legal name of the seller/vendor as printed on the invoice

seller_address.description: Seller's address. Look for labels like Address, Adres, Siedziba

street.description: Street name and building/apartment number (e.g. ul. Grunwaldzka 12/3, 123 Main St)

country.description: Country name or ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. PL, US, DE)

buyer_nip.description: Buyer's tax ID. EU VAT number with country prefix (e.g. PL7831812212, DE123456789) or US EIN/TIN. Include the country prefix if present

buyer_name.description: Full legal name of the buyer/customer as printed on the invoice

buyer_address.description: Buyer's address. Look for labels like Address, Adres, Bill To, Nabywca

street.description: Street name and building/apartment number (e.g. ul. Grunwaldzka 12/3, 123 Main St)

country.description: Country name or ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g. PL, US, DE)

bank_details.description: Seller's bank and payment details: IBAN, SWIFT/BIC, bank name, routing/account numbers, and any wire transfer instructions

bank_name.description: Name of the bank (e.g. PKO Bank Polski, Citibank N.A.)

bank_address.description: Bank branch address as printed on the invoice

routing_number.description: ABA routing number for US domestic wires (9 digits)

account_number.description: Bank account number for US wires (when separate from IBAN)

notes.description: Explicit payment instructions printed on the invoice, e.g. 'Reference: INV-2025-042', 'Include invoice number in memo', 'Intermediary bank: ...'. Null if no such instructions are present

net_amount.description: Invoice total before tax. Look for labels like Net Total, Subtotal, Razem netto, Amount Due before tax

vat_amount.description: Total tax amount. Look for labels like VAT, Tax, Kwota VAT, Sales Tax

gross_amount.description: Invoice total including tax. Look for labels like Total, Amount Due, Razem brutto, Balance Due

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. PLN, EUR, USD). Infer from currency symbols ($, zl, EUR) if not explicitly stated

line_items.description: Individual line items from the invoice table. Extract only product/service rows, skip subtotals and summaries

line_number.description: Sequential position of this line in the invoice (1-based)

description.description: Product or service description as printed on the invoice line

unit.description: Unit of measure (e.g. szt., kg, godz., hrs, pcs, ea)

quantity.description: Number of units for this line item

net_amount.description: Line total before tax (quantity x unit price)

vat_rate.description: Tax/VAT rate as a percentage (e.g. 23, 8, 5, 0). Look for labels like VAT, Tax Rate, Stawka VAT
